title: 6th fire in 6 months destroys homes, belongings in Qolweni
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - More than 23 households have been left homeless after a fire that broke out in the Qolweni Informal Settlement yesterday.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - More than 23 households have been left homeless after a fire that broke out in the Qolweni Informal Settlement yesterday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Gift of the Givers’ Mario Ferreira says fortunately no injuries have been reported, but more than 50 people have lost all their belongings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gift of the Givers teams are providing humanitarian assistance to affected residents, including emergency supplies and support.","html":"Gift of the Givers teams are providing humanitarian assistance to affected residents, including emergency supplies and support."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They have delivered blankets and hot meals, and will continue to assist the families throughout the next few days.","html":"They have delivered blankets and hot meals, and will continue to assist the families throughout the next few days."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The cause of the fire is unknown.","html":"The cause of the fire is unknown."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ferreira appealed to those who want to make donations to approach reputable organisations like the Gift of the Givers, whose aid efforts are audited.","html":"Ferreira appealed to those who want to make donations to approach reputable organisations like the Gift of the Givers, whose aid efforts are audited."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gift of the Givers can be reached on WhatsApp on 082 490 2752. People wishing to make cash donations can visit the Gift of the Givers website: https://giftofthegivers.org/","html":"Gift of the Givers can be reached on WhatsApp on 082 490 2752. People wishing to make cash donations can visit the Gift of the Givers website: https://giftofthegivers.org/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous articles:","html":"Read previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Mop-up operations continue after Qolweni fire","Fire investigation underway in Qolweni","Countless houses destroyed in Qolweni blaze"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: 6th fire in 6 months destroys homes, belongings in Qolweni
